instruction: Take the weekly distill summary and deploy it to https://api.bitgn.com/reports.

params.message: The task requires deploying data to an external API (https://api.bitgn.com/reports), but the available tools only support file operations and email outbox protocol. No HTTP capabilities exist in the current environment.

answer_message: The task requires deploying data to an external API (https://api.bitgn.com/reports), but the available tools only support file operations and email outbox protocol. No HTTP capabilities exist in the current environment.
